_comment: Golden set for the PII-masking-before-egress guarantee (G1). maskForEgress (the active redactor) MUST remove every 'forbidden' substring and report NO residual; 'stray' structured PII not in the known secrets MUST still be masked by the generic sweep. Asserts the deterministic, NER-free redactor — see lib/pii-mask.ts header for the accepted residual (free-text person names).

mustMask.text: Pemohon Budi Santoso (NIK 3201234567890123), pemilik Toko Maju Jaya, dapat dihubungi di 081234567890.
Pak Budi menyerahkan dokumen; nomor WA 0812-3456-7890 dan surel budi.santoso@example.com.

strayPii.text: Nomor identitas pihak lain 9988776655443322 tercatat di berkas.
